item.title: New advice on catch-up moves to start building wealth in your 40s, 50s and beyond
item.description: ‘It’s never too late.’

item.title: Four minutes of daily movement could help prevent type 2 diabetes, study finds
item.description: A new study reveals the surprisingly simple daily habit that could slash your risk of type 2 diabetes by more than a third.

item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have marked their 15th wedding anniversary.

item.description: ‘That’s the only information I have at this stage.’

item.description: ‘It’s really hard to put into words what it means for the franchise.’

item.description: Players are set to be informed of the situation this week.

item.description: ‘That’s not a step the sport would accept.’

item.title: Olympic hero Benjamin Karl faces backlash as ‘macho’ marriage comments ignite firestorm
item.description: The controversy began when the snowboarder’s wife said she wanted to go on a girls’ trip.

item.title: Cathy MacGuinness: Husband’s heartbreaking tribute to Sydney mother-of-three who died weeks after giving birth
item.description: The 40-year-old died of cardiac arrest linked to an undiagnosed heart condition, prompting a warning to women.

item.title: Much-loved Queensland jockey Shane McGovern undergoes second leg amputation in ‘devastating’ update
item.description: The ‘tough as nails’ Aussie faces a long recovery after getting trapped under his horse in a freak accident.

item.title: Family’s desperate plea as four-year-old Western Sydney girl loses most of her hair to alopecia
item.description: ‘She wants to know why… why is she losing her hair, why does it have to be her that’s going bald?’

item.description: The actor died suddenly aged 57 after announcing a new role on an Australian movie production.

item.title: Valtteri Bottas reveals ‘delusional’ physical and mental health battles during F1 career
item.description: ‘To this day, I have complicated feelings about it.’

item.title: Britney Spears charged over driving under the influence following arrest and stint in rehab facility
item.description: The pop star was arrested on a California highway last month.

item.title: Former NSW MP Rory Amon to face retrial over alleged sexual assault of teenage boy after Supreme Court jury deadloc
item.description: The 36-year-old claims he believed the 13-year-old was over the age of consent when they had sex in a car park toilet.

item.title: Dezi Freeman - The Hunt: Story of slain sovereign citizen and cop killer story uncovered in new 7NEWS podcast
item.description: A gripping new six-part investigative series from 7NEWS and LiSTNR reconstructs the hunt for Dezi Freeman — the man who murdered two police officers and vanished into the Victorian high country for seven months.

item.title: You’ll never guess who Australia’s second-fastest NBN provider is
item.description: Optus remains on top for NBN speeds, but the ACCC’s latest report shows a lower‑profile budget telco has quietly climbed into second place.

item.description: Senator Jacinta Nampijinpa Price and Senator Lidia Thorpe have called for calm.

item.title: Donald Trump wants Jimmy Kimmel ‘fired’ after US talk show host makes joke about Melania Trump
item.description: The reigniting of the feud comes after remarks about the First Lady sparked backlash.

item.title: Postnatal depression risk highest two weeks after birth, University of Queensland study finds
item.description: For many, the toughest moment comes after leaving hospital.

item.description: Step inside the eccentric mansion where psychedelic masterpieces meet vintage treasures.

item.title: Western Australian couple that struggled to conceive welcome rare set of quadruplets
item.description: The boy and three girls arrived just minutes apart.

item.title: Comedian Shane Jacobson reveals the challenges of buying country pub Dederang Hotel in rural Victoria
item.description: ‘It was so much harder than we imagined.’

item.description: Kidman’s interest in the idea sprouted when her mother passed away. Here’s what they really do.

item.description: ‘Some people think it’s disgusting, others are like good on you.’

item.description: The US President blasted allied countries as they were issued a new proposal.

item.description: A deteriorating situation has highlighted a ‘critical need’ among recipients.

item.description: ‘If we didn’t comply, they said they would open fire.’

item.description: ‘The pain and the hardship that exists in our regional communities is profound, and we will see it shake up this election.’

item.description: ‘A great champion and an extraordinary man.’

item.description: ‘It’s not something ... you want to experience when you’re that young, let alone ever.’

item.description: ‘We’re sharing a moment with someone ... and it’s often the worst moment of their life.’

item.description: ‘This is the honour of my life to be standing here.’

item.description: The princess had her unique sport skills on display in the footage shared by Kensington Palace.

item.description: One car flipped early and the feistiness continued all the way to the chequered flag.

item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 2026 Hyundai Tucson Hybrid FWD review
item.description: After several years on the market, is the entry-level hybrid Tucson still a mid-size SUV you should be considering? Ben Zachariah investigates.

item.title: 2026 Suzuki Jimny update spied testing
item.description: New spy photos suggest Suzuki is preparing to update its popular Jimny off-roader, the current generation of which has been on sale since 2018.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Passenger trapped as car sinks in weir; manslaughter charge after nurse killed in crash
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Bluey birthday cake nightmare leaves Gold Coast toddler in induced coma
item.description: The toddler was rushed to hospital after a freak accident with a common ingredient.

item.title: Honda to delay next-generation ZR-V, Accord after expensive EV cancellations – report
item.description: Replacements for a number of Honda and Acura models, including the Accord and ZR-V, have been delayed until 2030, at the earliest.

item.title: Bystanders stop teenage thieves from stealing alcohol on NSW Central Coast
item.description: The boys were red-faced as they left the store empty handed.

item.title: Melbourne braces for bitter cold snap with wintry hail to end the week in Australia’s southeast
item.description: A cold front is moving up from the Southern Ocean on Wednesday.

item.title: Kane Cornes explains decision to step down from AFL All Australian panel role after Sportsbet policy change
item.description: The expert commentator has made an admission as one of his fellow panellists faces up to ‘a hypothetical’.

item.title: Dubai airport chaos as airlines suspend flights amid Iranian missile strikes on the United Arab Emirates
item.description: The escalation of conflict in the Middle East is causing major flight disruptions.

item.title: Chery ute naming competition: Voting open, shortlist includes a dig at the BYD Shark
item.description: Chery has asked Australians to pick a name for its new ute, and the shortlist includes some iconic Australian names.

item.title: Three people to be evacuated from cruise ship amid deadly hantavirus outbreak
item.description: Three people have died and several others have fallen ill from the rare but highly deadly virus.

item.title: Australian basketball icon Lauren Jackson appointed to new WNBL leadership position
item.description: The legend is taking the reins after the former boss was let go in a ‘genuinely disappointing’ saga.

item.title: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka flags shock grand slam boycott over prize money: ‘Only way’
item.description: ‘Without us there wouldn’t be a tournament and there wouldn’t be that entertainment.’
